payload_name: ShopXO Download File Read (Nuclei: CNVD-2021-15822)
payload_description: [Nuclei CNVD-2021-15822 by pikpikcu] ShopXO is an open source enterprise-level open source e-commerce system. ShopXO has an arbitrary file reading vulnerability, which can be used by attackers to obtain sensitive information.

payload_name: Landray-OA - Local File Inclusion (Nuclei: CNVD-2021-28277)
payload_description: [Nuclei CNVD-2021-28277 by pikpikcu,daffainfo] Landray-OA is susceptible to local file inclusion.

payload_description: [Nuclei CNVD-2021-41972 by DhiyaneshDk] All firewall devices that use the AceNet AceReporter report component can download arbitrary files

payload_name: MPSec ISG1000 Security Gateway - Arbitrary File Download (Nuclei: CNVD-2021-43984)
payload_description: [Nuclei CNVD-2021-43984 by DhiyaneshDk] The MPSec ISG1000 safety gateway at MP Communications Technology Co., Ltd. has any file download loophole, and attackers can use the loophole to obtain sensitive information.

payload_name: Leadsec VPN - Arbitrary File Read (Nuclei: CNVD-2021-64035)
payload_description: [Nuclei CNVD-2021-64035 by xiaoWangSec] There is an information leakage vulnerability in the SSL VPN of Beijing Wangyuxingyun Information Technology Co., Ltd., and attackers can use the vulnerability to obtain sensitive information.

payload_name: Weaver OA XmlRpcServlet - Arbitary File Read (Nuclei: CNVD-2022-43245)
payload_description: [Nuclei CNVD-2022-43245 by SleepingBag945] e-office is a standard collaborative mobile office platform. Ltd. e-office has an arbitrary file reading vulnerability, which can be exploited by attackers to obtain sensitive information.

payload_name: EduSoho < v22.4.7 - Local File Inclusion (Nuclei: CNVD-2023-03903)
payload_description: [Nuclei CNVD-2023-03903 by s4e-io] The edusoho education and training system <v22.4.7 has unauthorized file reading vulnerability. Through this vulnerability, an attacker can read the contents of the config/parameters.yml file and obtain sensitive information such as the secret value saved in the file and database account password...

payload_name: Squirrelmail <=1.4.6 - Local File Inclusion (Nuclei: CVE-2006-2842)
payload_description: [Nuclei CVE-2006-2842 by dhiyaneshDk] SquirrelMail 1.4.6 and earlier versions are susceptible to a PHP local file inclusion vulnerability in functions/plugin.php if register_globals is enabled and magic_quotes_gpc is disabled. This allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the plugins array parameter.

payload_name: Webmin < 1.290 / Usermin < 1.220 - Arbitrary File Disclosure (Nuclei: CVE-2006-3392)
payload_description: [Nuclei CVE-2006-3392 by s4e-io] Webmin before 1.290 and Usermin before 1.220 contain a path traversal caused by calling the simplify_path function before decoding HTML, letting remote attackers read arbitrary files, exploit requires sending crafted '..%01' sequences.

payload_name: Joomla! RSfiles <=1.0.2 - Local File Inclusion (Nuclei: CVE-2007-4504)
payload_description: [Nuclei CVE-2007-4504 by daffainfo] Joomla! RSfiles 1.0.2 and earlier is susceptible to local file inclusion in index.php in the RSfiles component (com_rsfiles). This could allow remote attackers to arbitrarily read files via a .. (dot dot) in the path parameter in a files.display action.

payload_name: WordPress Sniplets 1.1.2 - Local File Inclusion (Nuclei: CVE-2008-1059)
payload_description: [Nuclei CVE-2008-1059 by dhiyaneshDK] PHP remote file inclusion vulnerability in modules/syntax_highlight.php in the Sniplets 1.1.2 and 1.2.2 plugin for WordPress allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the libpath parameter.

payload_name: CMSimple 3.1 - Local File Inclusion (Nuclei: CVE-2008-2650)
payload_description: [Nuclei CVE-2008-2650 by pussycat0x] CMSimple 3.1 is susceptible to local file inclusion via cmsimple/cms.php when register_globals is enabled which allows remote attackers to include and execute arbitrary local files via a .. (dot dot) in the sl parameter to index.php. NOTE: this can be leveraged for remote file execution by includ...
